texto: Nature is such as to give rise to conscious beings with minds
autor: and it is such as to be comprehensible to such beings. Ultimately therefore such beings should be comprehensible to themselves.
explicacao: Citação de and it is such as to be comprehensible to such beings. Ultimately therefore such beings should be comprehensible to themselves. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Nature is such as to give rise to conscious beings with minds” articula reflexao, thomas-nagel, nature em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
